title: Ventura County high-rise — > 75 ft, out of pilot scope
notes: Tests building-scale reject path in Ventura context.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 300 E ESPLANADE DR, VENTURA COUNTY (OXNARD area)
New 9-story mixed-use building
Occupancy Groups: R-2 (residential floors 3-9), B (office floor 2), M (retail ground floor)
Construction Type: I-B
Building height: 98 ft
Number of stories: 9 above grade + 1 below
Design occupant load: 920
Fully sprinklered: NFPA 13
High-rise per IBC 403 — smoke control, voice alarm, standby power
